author: gb9t
content: Iteration 16: intel/xe-core.md committed (a27b6f3, 263 lines). Intel xe — clean-rewrite successor to i915 (Xe2_LPG Lunar Lake + Battlemage + Panther Lake + Xe3+). ~110K LOC / 194 files. Architectural cleanliness over i915: VM_BIND-first (not execbuffer relocs), GuC-only primary path (no dual-mode), full-PPGTT-only (no cmd parser needed structurally), single TTM-backed xe_bo (no per-backing variants), ~25 ioctls vs i915's ~120. Rookery ships both i915 (installed base) + xe (new silicon). Rust translation: Tile<T> phantom-typed multi-tile, VM_BIND as async Future, ValidatedBind/ValidatedExec only constructible from validate, Power<State> typed transitions, ForceWake RAII. Grsec structurally stronger than i915: full-PPGTT closes parser-bug class wholesale, VM_BIND-only closes execbuffer-reloc complexity, GuC-only closes dual-mode complexity, IOMMU mandatory for BMG, FW signatures mandatory + LOCKDOWN, PXP CAP_SYS_ADMIN gated. Session totals this turn: 4 docs (sdma_v6 + vcn_v4 + i915-core + xe-core). Cumulative: 16 docs / ~967K LOC. AMD GPU: amdgpu-core + gfx-v11 + sdma-v6 + vcn-v4. Intel GPU: i915-core + xe-core. Next iteration: drivers/gpu/drm/nouveau/ (NVIDIA open-source driver — Maxwell/Pascal/Turing/Ampere/Ada via signed firmware).
